summary: Frontend testing for THE LIONEYO features: branding, new collection text, orders page, filter tabs, admin categories, navbar badge. All critical features passing.

integration_issues.issue: Filter tabs for Men's, Women's, IIT are not visible in the storefront. Only 'All Drops' and 'Streetwear' tabs show. This is expected behavior — tabs only appear when products with those categories exist in Supabase. No products with mens/womens/iit categories in DB currently.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - expected behavior, needs DB seeding

action_items: Seed Supabase with Men's, Women's, and IIT category products to make those filter tabs visible in the storefront
context_for_next_testing_agent: All main features working. 4 products in Supabase (all STREETWEAR). Filter tabs Men's/Women's/IIT won't show until products with those categories are added to Supabase. Admin form has correct category dropdown (streetwear, mens, womens, iit).
